Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.dialogs

Class NewConstantDialog

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jface.window.Window
org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.Dialog
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.dialogs.EventBDialog
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.dialogs.NewConstantDialog
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.jface.window.IShellProvider
public class NewConstantDialog extends EventBDialog
This class extends the Dialog class and provides an input dialog for creating a new variable along with its type axiom

      Parameters:
      wizard - the parent wizard of this dialog
      root - the context root to which constants will be added
      parentShell - the parent shell of the dialog
      title - the title of the dialog
